CREATE TABLE Prices (id INT, price1 INT, price2 INT, price3 INT);
INSERT INTO Prices VALUES (4, NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT (bif:__max_notnull(price1, price2, price3)) AS max_price FROM Prices;
SELECT s, (bif:__max_notnull(price1, price2, price3)) AS max_price FROM <http://testgraph.com> WHERE { ?s ?p ?price. } GROUP BY s;
SELECT __max_notnull((SELECT MAX(price1) FROM Prices WHERE price1 IS NOT NULL), (SELECT MAX(price2) FROM Prices WHERE price2 IS NOT NULL));
SELECT __max_notnull(SELECT price1 FROM Prices WHERE price1 IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1, 1), 9;
SELECT s, (bif:__max_notnull(price1, price3)) AS max_price FROM <http://testgraph.com> WHERE s IN (SELECT s FROM Prices);
SELECT (bif:__max_notnull(price1, price2, price3)) AS overall_max FROM (SELECT price1, price2, price3 FROM Prices WHERE price3 IS NOT NULL) AS t;
